summary: Classified 5 open pull requests independently for the live PR inventory shard. No canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or security-route action is planned.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical and no low-signal or security signal; keep it independent for maintainer review outside this inventory shard.
Focused bug-fix PR with useful code and passing proof, but merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter and no duplicate/superseding target is hydrated.
Substantive scoped contributor PR with unique implementation scope and no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical; keep it independent for maintainer technical review.
Focused channel parity bug-fix PR with passing security/proof checks and no boundary-bypass report in the hydrated artifact; keep it independent rather than routing or closing.
Focused contributor PR with useful code, but the live label says waiting on author; keep it independent and do not close or merge from this inventory shard.
